plugin_desc: Advantech EKI industrial managed switch-specific SNMP collection (ADVANTECH-EKI-PRONEER-MIB, IANA PEN 10297). In addition to standard IF-MIB interface metrics, it collects the Advantech private redundant-power LED-state object (ledPWR1Status under the ledStatus group) used as a power-supply health indicator. The LED raw codes (0=notSupported, 1=up meaning power present/OK, 2=down meaning power input lost) are normalized via telegraf processors.enum to 1=healthy / 2=fault, with notSupported treated as healthy. EKI switches are fanless and the ProView MIB exposes no CPU, memory, numeric temperature or fan objects (only discrete LED-state enums), so CPU, memory, temperature and fan are not collected (N/A). Supported brands/models — Advantech EKI-5000/5500/5600/5700/7000 managed industrial Ethernet switches.
name: Switch

metrics.name: device_psu_state
metrics.description: This metric reports the power-supply health of the Advantech EKI device, derived from the redundant-power LED-state object (ADVANTECH-EKI-PRONEER-MIB ledPWR1Status). The raw codes (0=notSupported, 1=up meaning power present/OK, 2=down meaning power input lost) are normalized via telegraf processors.enum so that 1 = healthy and 2 = fault. A value greater than 1 indicates a lost power input on the monitored feed, which on a dual-feed industrial switch means loss of redundancy and warrants investigation.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counter (ifXTable). The 64-bit counter avoids the rapid wrap of the 32-bit ifInOctets on high-speed switch ports, keeping the rate accurate.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric calculates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counter (ifXTable). The 64-bit counter avoids the rapid wrap of the 32-bit ifOutOctets on high-speed switch ports, keeping the rate accurate.
